import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
mut output = ""
mut first = true

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      let num = match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      let sq = num * num
      if first
        output = "#{sq}"
        first = false
      else
        output = "#{output} #{sq}"
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  let num = match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let sq = num * num
  if first
    output = "#{sq}"
    first = false
  else
    output = "#{output} #{sq}"
  end
end

println(output)
